author: バンダイナムコフィルムワークス
text:
【Magical Sisters LuluttoLilly】Episode06 #MSLL
PLAYLIST：https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLKPsuBIKuejMR6v7XCBOMy7Xesql1re66

🌟Episode06: SUMMER MEANS A TRAINING CAMP!
To prepare for their future activities as idols, Lilly, Lulu, Toko, and Sena decide to have a training camp at a seaside cottage! After taking a dip on the private beach, the four of them practice their singing and dancing! But the next day, unexpected trouble....!PLAYLISTht
🌙INTRODUCTION
Fuu Nonoyama - an innocent elementary school student very excited for Summer Vacation. 
Rui Nonoyama - a modest, hard-working Junior High School Student. 
Two sisters that only recently have become distant from each other… 
One day, Fuu encountered a mysterious spaceship and received magical powers. Rui also had received magical powers. Fuu and Rui transform into the grown-up versions they wish to be. 
However, there are two rules: You will only have magical powers for one year and No one should know about your magical powers. 
The two of them did not know each other’s secret! Each of them will become idols!

🩵WEBSITE
◼︎Official website
　https://www.luluttolilly.com/
◼︎Official Global website
　https://v-storage.jp/pierrot_magicalgirls/msll-global-website/

🩷SNS
◼︎Official X
　https://x.com/luluttolilly
◼︎Official TikTok
　https://www.tiktok.com/@luluttolilly
◼︎Official Instagram
　https://www.instagram.com/luluttolilly

#MSLL #ルルットリリィ #るるりり

©Pierrot, LuluttoLilly Production Committee
